category_sources: source_facts.description says assembler for the Java Virtual Machine; official Jasmin homepage says it converts ASCII descriptions of Java classes into binary class files for the JVM.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is JASMIN HOME PAGE; SourceForge project title is Jasmin - a Java assembler.
docs_sources: Official Jasmin homepage Documentation section links to the user guide, instruction syntax, and JasminXT syntax.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project exposes a Code tab for Jasmin; source_facts.repo is empty. The exact VCS backend was not clearly surfaced in accessible page text.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe Jasmin as a Java Virtual Machine assembler for JVM class files.
